requirement_topic.en: NRCS Letter of Authority Scope Review

summary.en: South Africa's National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications administers compulsory specifications and Letter of Authority routes for regulated products. For an EV charger, the prudent South Africa entry step is to confirm with NRCS or a competent conformity professional whether the complete EVSE unit, embedded power-supply assemblies, plugs, socket-outlets, cable assemblies, or other electrotechnical parts fall within an applicable compulsory specification and require an LOA before import or sale.
summary.zh: 南非国家强制规范监管机构负责管理受监管产品的强制规范和授权书路径。对于电动汽车充电桩，进入南非市场前的审慎步骤是向NRCS或合格合规专业人士确认整机EVSE、内置电源组件、插头、插座、电缆组件或其他电工部件是否落入适用强制规范并在进口或销售前需要LOA。
summary.zht: 南非國家強制規範監管機構負責管理受監管產品的強制規範和授權書路徑。對於電動汽車充電樁，進入南非市場前的審慎步驟是向NRCS或合格合規專業人士確認整機EVSE、內置電源組件、插頭、插座、電纜組件或其他電工部件是否落入適用強制規範並在進口或銷售前需要LOA。

standards_or_laws: National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications Act and NRCS electrotechnical compulsory-specification administration
NRCS Letter of Authority process for regulated electrotechnical products where applicable
Applicable compulsory specifications only after product-specific scope confirmation

summary.en: China-market evidence commonly includes CCC or voluntary certification files, GB/T 18487 test reports, GB/T 20234 connector reports, factory inspection files, and Chinese labels. These documents can support technical review but do not replace a South Africa NRCS scope decision or LOA where a compulsory specification applies.
summary.zh: 中国市场证据通常包括CCC或自愿认证文件、GB/T 18487检测报告、GB/T 20234接口报告、工厂检查文件和中文标签。这些文件可支持技术审查，但不能替代南非NRCS适用范围判断或在强制规范适用时的LOA。
summary.zht: 中國市場證據通常包括CCC或自願認證文件、GB/T 18487檢測報告、GB/T 20234接口報告、工廠檢查文件和中文標籤。這些文件可支持技術審查，但不能替代南非NRCS適用範圍判斷或在強制規範適用時的LOA。

standards_or_laws: China CCC or voluntary EV charger certification files where applicable

gap.en: The core gap is regulatory scope, not just test data. Importers should map the bill of materials and product configuration to NRCS regulated-product categories, identify whether any compulsory specification applies, and obtain LOA evidence where required. A China test report alone should not be used as proof that an EV charger can be imported or sold in South Africa.
gap.zh: 核心差距是监管适用范围，而不仅是检测数据。进口商应将物料清单和产品配置映射至NRCS受监管产品类别，识别是否有强制规范适用，并在需要时取得LOA证据。不应仅凭中国检测报告证明电动汽车充电桩可以在南非进口或销售。
gap.zht: 核心差距是監管適用範圍，而不僅是檢測數據。進口商應將物料清單和產品配置映射至NRCS受監管產品類別，識別是否有強制規範適用，並在需要時取得LOA證據。不應僅憑中國檢測報告證明電動汽車充電樁可以在南非進口或銷售。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory only where the complete charger or an included electrotechnical component is within an applicable South African compulsory specification and NRCS LOA route; product-specific scope confirmation is required
mandatory_status.cn: China CCC is mandatory only for products in the CCC catalogue; GB/T 18487 and GB/T 20234 evidence is not a South Africa LOA substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat NRCS LOA as a scope-controlled requirement. Confirm the exact EV charger configuration with NRCS or a qualified South African conformity specialist before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将NRCS LOA视为取决于适用范围的要求。出货前应向NRCS或合格南非合规专业人士确认电动汽车充电桩的具体配置。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將NRCS LOA視為取決於適用範圍的要求。出貨前應向NRCS或合格南非合規專業人士確認電動汽車充電樁的具體配置。
